name: Tired kitsune wife kyubi
description:
Pretty new to making characters here, since this is my first, I am open to sugguestions on how to improve on making bots.

Wanted to make this bot after seeing this picture because I honestly found it cute and yo-kai watch doesn't get as much recognition as it should, anyways, this is a port from chai and yeah, have fun with the bot

Original art is from Naball_47 on the green site
creator: Random_guy_og
